initiatives.name: Bridge Community Cafe
initiatives.description: A community cafe fostering mutual aid and solidarity through accessible food and gathering spaces in Ann Arbor. They coordinate pay-what-you-can meals, community events, and resource sharing while building power through food justice, collective care, and creating spaces for connection and movement building.

initiatives.name: Interfaith Council for Peace and Justice
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through interfaith organizing and peace activism in Ann Arbor. They coordinate direct action, educational programs, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice, environmental justice, and creating spaces for interfaith collaboration and social change.

initiatives.name: Ann Arbor Tenants Union
initiatives.description: Organizing tenants in the Ann Arbor and Ypsilanti area since 1968.

initiatives.name: Ann Arbor for Palestine
initiatives.description: The Greater Community of Ann Arbor for a Free Palestine

initiatives.name: SAFE (Students Allied for Freedom and Equality)
initiatives.description: Students Allied for Freedom and Equality is an SJP chapter in Ann Arbor, MI fighting for divestment, liberation, and return

initiatives.name: Washtenaw Camp Outreach
initiatives.description: Washtenaw Camp Outreach is a community outreach/survival aid group
